caption: A person holds a smartphone horizontally in front of a blurred background featuring a person and a decorative tree with colorful glowing lights. The phone screen displays a digital game interface titled "Rage Quit Wheel" with a circular, red-and-white spinning wheel on the right side. Across the sequence, the text on the left side of the screen changes as the wheel is used. Initially, the screen displays "Pack-A-Punch 16x + Gold Players". In the next instance, the text updates to "93 Jackpot". This is followed by a change to "3x Store Packs", and finally, the text displays "91 Jackpot". The phone remains connected to a white charging cable on the right side throughout the scenes, and the person's fingers are visible gripping the edges of the device.
